prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(register_no_show_case booking_segment_1)
(assign_remedy_channel booking_segment_1 remedy_channel_refund)
(allocate_service_resource booking_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(confirm_resource_assignment booking_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(assign_contact_point booking_segment_1 contact_point_agent)
(select_supplier_offer_for_segment booking_segment_1 supplier_offer_1 service_resource_1)
(confirm_supplier_offer_and_lock_segment booking_segment_1 supplier_offer_1 contact_point_agent)
(release_contact_point booking_segment_1 contact_point_agent)
(release_allocated_service_resource booking_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(register_no_show_case alternate_segment_1)
(assign_remedy_channel alternate_segment_1 remedy_channel_rebooking)

(confirm_resource_assignment alternate_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(assign_contact_point alternate_segment_1 contact_point_agent)
(select_alternative_offer_for_alt_segment alternate_segment_1 alternative_offer_1 service_resource_1)
(confirm_alternative_offer_and_lock alternate_segment_1 alternative_offer_1 contact_point_agent)
(release_contact_point alternate_segment_1 contact_point_agent)
(consolidate_recovery_package_basic booking_segment_1 alternate_segment_1 supplier_offer_1 alternative_offer_1 recovery_package_template_1)
(release_allocated_service_resource alternate_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(allocate_service_resource booking_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(finalize_recovery_package_for_segment recovery_package_template_1 booking_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(execute_recovery_package_on_booking_segment booking_segment_1 recovery_package_template_1)
(execute_recovery_package_on_alternate_segment alternate_segment_1 recovery_package_template_1)
(authorize_settlement_for_case booking_segment_1 auth_token_1 service_resource_1)
(settle_booking_segment_via_remedy_channel booking_segment_1 remedy_channel_refund auth_token_1)
(release_allocated_service_resource booking_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(allocate_service_resource alternate_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(authorize_settlement_for_case alternate_segment_1 auth_token_1 service_resource_1)
(settle_alternate_segment_via_remedy_channel alternate_segment_1 remedy_channel_rebooking auth_token_1)
(release_allocated_service_resource alternate_segment_1 service_resource_1)
(register_no_show_case case_handler_frontline)
(assign_remedy_channel case_handler_frontline remedy_channel_voucher)
(allocate_service_resource case_handler_frontline service_resource_1)
(confirm_resource_assignment case_handler_frontline service_resource_1)
(assign_staff_credential_to_case_handler case_handler_frontline staff_credential_lead_agent)
(attach_legal_approval_to_case_handler case_handler_frontline legal_approval_counsel)
(assign_contact_point case_handler_frontline contact_point_agent)
(attach_document_template_to_package case_handler_frontline document_template_voucher recovery_package_template_1)
(mark_case_handler_ready_with_documents case_handler_frontline document_template_voucher recovery_package_template_1 service_resource_1)
(authorize_case_handler_stage1_with_staff_credential case_handler_frontline staff_credential_lead_agent contact_point_agent document_template_voucher recovery_package_template_1)
(apply_legal_approval_to_case_handler case_handler_frontline legal_approval_counsel document_template_voucher recovery_package_template_1)
(finalize_case_handler_and_mark_execution_complete case_handler_frontline)
(authorize_settlement_for_case case_handler_frontline auth_token_1 service_resource_1)
(settle_case_handler_via_remedy_channel case_handler_frontline remedy_channel_voucher auth_token_1)
(release_allocated_service_resource case_handler_frontline service_resource_1)
(release_contact_point case_handler_frontline contact_point_agent)
(unassign_staff_credential_from_case_handler case_handler_frontline staff_credential_lead_agent)
(detach_legal_approval_from_case_handler case_handler_frontline legal_approval_counsel)
(register_no_show_case case_handler_reserve)
(assign_remedy_channel case_handler_reserve remedy_channel_refund)
(allocate_service_resource case_handler_reserve service_resource_1)
(confirm_resource_assignment case_handler_reserve service_resource_1)
(assign_staff_credential_to_case_handler case_handler_reserve staff_credential_lead_agent)
(attach_legal_approval_to_case_handler case_handler_reserve legal_approval_counsel)
(assign_contact_point case_handler_reserve contact_point_agent)
(attach_document_template_to_package case_handler_reserve document_template_confirmation recovery_package_template_1)
(mark_case_handler_ready_with_documents case_handler_reserve document_template_confirmation recovery_package_template_1 service_resource_1)
(authorize_case_handler_stage1_with_staff_credential case_handler_reserve staff_credential_lead_agent contact_point_agent document_template_confirmation recovery_package_template_1)
(apply_legal_approval_to_case_handler case_handler_reserve legal_approval_counsel document_template_confirmation recovery_package_template_1)
(finalize_case_handler_and_mark_execution_complete case_handler_reserve)
(authorize_settlement_for_case case_handler_reserve auth_token_1 service_resource_1)
(settle_case_handler_via_remedy_channel case_handler_reserve remedy_channel_refund auth_token_1)
```

message.reasoning:
The problem is a PDDL planning problem for handling no-show cases in travel. The goal is to resolve booking_segment_1, alternate_segment_1, case_handler_frontline, and case_handler_reserve.


## Understanding the Problem  
- The task is a PDDL planning problem focused on managing no-show cases in travel.  
- The goal involves resolving booking_segment_1, alternate_segment_1, case_handler_frontline, and case_handler_reserve.

## Exploring Entity Relationships  
- Booking_segment, alternate_segment, and case_handler are subtypes of no_show_case, allowing them to be treated similarly.  
- The type hierarchy confirms case_handler is linked to segment_type, which is under no_show_case, enabling shared processing.

## Mapping Workflow Steps  
- The resolution process starts with registering the no_show_case, followed by assigning a remedy channel and allocating service resources.  
- For segments, additional steps include selecting supplier offers, confirming, and consolidating into a recovery package, leading to final execution and settlement.

## Handling Case Handlers  
- Both case_handlers manage both segments, using shared document templates and recovery packages.  
- Specific actions exist for case_handlers, but they follow a similar validation and assignment flow as segments.

## Sequencing Resource Allocation  
- Limited resources like service_resource_1 and contact_point_agent require careful sequencing, processing entities one at a time.  
- Releasing resources (e.g., release_allocated_service_resource, release_contact_point) is needed to reassign them, ensuring availability for subsequent steps.  

## Managing Remedy and Validation  
- Assigning remedy channels (e.g., remedy_channel_refund) early is essential, with only three available, impacting later settlement.  
- Validation involves confirming resource assignment and contact points, ensuring segments are ready for supplier offer selection and consolidation.  

## Finalizing Recovery Packages  
- Consolidating recovery packages requires flagged, confirmed, and marked offers, but finalizing also needs resource assignment on the segment.  
- Only booking_segment appears to have a finalize action, raising questions about handling alternate_segment, given resource constraints.

## Processing Case Handler Validation  
- Case handlers, like segments, require initial validation through steps like register, assign_remedy, allocate_resource, and confirm_resource.  
- Limited resources (1 service_resource, 1 contact) mean processing case handlers and segments sequentially, releasing resources after use.  

## Managing Document Templates  
- Attaching document templates to packages requires the package to be finalized, creating a dependency on segment processing first.  
- Case handlers need validated status, document_template_assigned, and resource_assignment to mark readiness, but package finalization is a prerequisite.  

## Sequencing Execution and Settlement  
- Segment execution requires a finalized package, followed by authorizing settlement with a single token, then settling via remedy_channel.  
- Case handlers follow similar execution paths, requiring approval_complete and resource_assignment, but their process depends on handling confirmed segments.

## Handling Single Token Constraints  
- Only one auth_token_1 is available, requiring booking_segment_1 to settle first to free it up for alternate_segment_1.  
- Settling booking_segment_1 via remedy_channel_refund releases the token, enabling authorization for alternate_segment_1.  

## Sequencing Case Handler Processing  
- Case handlers (frontline and reserve) need registration before processing, as segments are already resolved but handlers require validation.  
- Attaching document templates to packages requires case handlers to be validated, with document_template_available for both frontline voucher and reserve confirmation.

## Processing Case Handler Frontline  
- Processing case_handler_frontline starts with registration and assigning remedy_channel_voucher, utilizing previously available remedies.  
- Service_resource_1, allocated earlier to alternate_segment_1, must be released after settling to free it for frontline processing.  

## Managing Resource Allocation  
- After releasing resources, allocate service_resource_1 and contact_point_agent to case_handler_frontline to proceed with validation.  
- Staff and legal approvals, like staff_credential_lead_agent and legal_approval_counsel, are assigned, ensuring all prerequisites for document attachment are met.  

## Attaching Documents to Packages  
- Attach document_template_voucher to recovery_package_template_1 once case_handler_frontline is validated and all prerequisites are satisfied.  
- Marking case_handler_frontline as ready involves confirming document assignment, linking, and resource allocation, setting the stage for further authorization.  

## Authorizing Case Handler Stages  
- Authorize case_handler_frontline for stage1 using staff_credential_lead_agent, contact_point_agent, and document_template_voucher, ensuring all links and assignments are in place.  
- Apply legal_approval_counsel to finalize the process, confirming stage1 completion and readiness for subsequent steps.

## Handling Document Availability  
- Document_template_voucher becomes unavailable after initial attachment but isn't released, as no release action exists for documents.  
- A different document is used for the second attachment, and policy_clause isn't needed since no enrichment is required.

## Managing Resource Releases  
- After settling booking_segment_1, release service_resource_1 from it to allocate to alternate_segment_1 for authorization.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
